data.title: Mill Creek Residential breaks ground on Modera Allston in Boston, adding 240 homes to the neighborhood.
data.description: Major developer Mill Creek Residential has revealed plans to construct 240 new homes in a modern midrise community in the western Boston neighborhood. The development, expected to significantly impact the area, is set to be completed by 2026. Mill Creek Residential is renowned for its expertise in developing and managing high-quality rental housing properties throughout the United States.

data.title: Bain & Co. appoints Tom de Waele as new regional managing partner for EMEA, effective January 26.
data.description: In London on February 18, 2026, Bain & Company revealed the appointment of Tom De Waele as the new regional managing partner for Europe, the Middle East & Africa (EMEA) starting from January 26. De Waele steps into the role during a pivotal period for the firm in EMEA, where key strategies and initiatives are being implemented.

data.title: Verisk's Q4 2025 revenue was $779M, up 5.9%, net income $197M, adjusted EBITDA $437M. Full-year revenue $3.1B, net income $908M.
data.description: Verisk, a strategic data analytics partner, reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 results. In Q4, revenue was $779M (up 5.9%), net income $197M (down 6.2%), and adjusted EBITDA $437M (up 9.8%). Diluted GAAP EPS was $1.42 (down 1.4%), and diluted adjusted EPS was $1.82 (up 13.0%). Full-year 2025 revenue was $3,073M (up 6.6%), net income was $908M (down 5.1%), and adjusted EBITDA was $1,727M (up 9.6%). The Board approved a cash dividend increase to 50 cents per share and a share repurchase authorization to $2.5B. Q4 net cash provided by operating activities was $343M (up 34.4%), and free cash flow was $276M (up 38.0%). In 2026, the company expects revenue of $3,190-3,240M, adjusted EBITDA of $1,790-1,830M, and diluted adjusted EPS of $7.45-7.75. Verisk terminated an acquisition agreement and sold a business unit in Q4 2025, impacting revenues. On February 13, 2026, the Board approved a 50 cents per share cash dividend and a share repurchase program. Verisk emphasized the importance of non-GAAP financial measures, including adjusted EBITDA, diluted adjusted EPS, and free cash flow, and highlighted the impact of foreign currency on its operations.

data.title: Implantica presents Year-end Report (Q4 2025) on Feb 25 at 8:00 a.m. CET, with a presentation at 15:00 CET.
data.description: Liechtenstein-based company, Implantica AG (publ), is set to host an investor presentation of their Year-end Report for Q5 2025 on February 25 at 15:00 CET. The report for Q4 2025 will be released at 8:00 a.m. CET on the same day. The presentation will be conducted in English. Investors are encouraged to attend and gain insights into the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Bison Wealth introduces Bison Managed 401(k) at PowerMy401k.com for optimizing 401(k) returns. Fast-growing RIA firm.
data.description: In Atlanta on February 18, 2026, Bison Wealth, a rapidly expanding registered investment advisory (RIA) company in the US, revealed the introduction of Bison Managed 401(k) at PowerMy401k.com. This innovative service aims to enhance 401(k) returns with expert guidance.

data.title: Dubai Police hosts 7th UAE SWAT Challenge with 109 teams from 48 nations, showcasing elite tactical skills.
data.description: In a show of unparalleled skill and expertise, the UAE SWAT Challenge 2026 concluded its 7th edition in Dubai, UAE, reaffirming its status as the premier global event for elite tactical police units. Organized by Dubai Police, the competition featured an impressive lineup of 109 teams from around the world. This year's event demonstrated the unparalleled capabilities and proficiency of these specialized units, further solidifying the UAE SWAT Challenge as the largest and most prestigious gathering of its kind.

data.title: Appili Therapeutics completes 2nd tranche of unbrokered private placement.
data.description: In the latest development, the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has now surpassed 1.5 million, with over 50,000 deaths reported. The government announced new restrictions in an effort to curb the spread of the virus, limiting gatherings to no more than 10 people. Additionally, businesses such as restaurants and gyms will operate at reduced capacity. The healthcare system is under immense pressure, with hospitals at 90% capacity. The government is urging the public to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help slow the spread of the virus.

data.title: New Brr-Nana Slurpee now available at 7-Eleven stores nationwide - banana flavor makes a comeback!
data.description: A popular frozen treat is now available in stores across the country, so make sure to get your hands on one before they sell out! The nostalgic banana flavor is making a comeback after demands from Slurpee drink enthusiasts. This news comes from Irving, Texas, as of February 18, 2026.

data.title: AcuityMD releases AcuityMD for Salesforce on Salesforce AppExchange, enhancing commercial team capabilities. Fasten sales goals.
data.description: AcuityMD, a MedTech company based in Boston, has recently introduced AcuityMD for Salesforce on the Salesforce AppExchange platform. This new integration allows customers to effectively merge AcuityMD's platform with Salesforce, enabling commercial teams to streamline their processes. By utilizing accurate data, AI-driven insights, and user-friendly workflows, AcuityMD aims to assist commercial teams in identifying opportunities, researching and prioritizing targets, and achieving sales targets more efficiently. This collaboration is set to enhance the speed and effectiveness of commercial operations.

data.title: New initiative aims to scale modern cooking technologies in Africa with the help of Rockefeller Foundation and other partners. Over 1 billion people in Africa rely on traditional fuels, such as wood and charcoal. The initiative seeks to expand access to cleaner cooking methods.
data.description: A new Clean Cooking Accelerator Initiative was introduced at the 2026 IEA Ministerial meeting with a focus on Africa, where around 1 billion individuals depend on traditional fuels like wood and charcoal. The initiative aims to enhance access to cleaner and healthier cooking techniques by bolstering supply chains.

data.title: Intracom Telecom introduces UltraLink-GX80 with 15Gbps in the US for wireless transport needs.
data.description: Intracom Telecom, a leading global provider of technology systems and solutions, made public the launch of its UltraLink™-GX80 Advanced E-Band radio in the United States on February 18, 2026. This advanced radio offers impressive speeds of up to 15 Gbps in each direction, catering to the increasing demands of wireless transport solutions in the country.
